import React from 'react'; import ReactDOM from "react-dom"; interface FilterModalProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; filters: { serviceType: string; workType: string; carePlaceType: string; startDate: string; location: string; gender: string; order: string; } onFilterChange: (filters: any) => void; onFilterApply: () => void; onFilterReset: () => void; } const FilterModal: React.FC = ({ isOpen, onClose, filters, onFilterChange, onFilterApply, onFilterReset }) => { const modalRoot = document.getElementById("modal-root"); React.useEffect(() => { if (isOpen) { document.body.classList.add("modal-open"); } return () => document.body.classList.remove("modal-open"); }, [isOpen]); if (!isOpen || !modalRoot) return null; const handleChange = (field: string, value: string) => { onFilterChange({...filters, [field]: value}); }; return ReactDOM.createPortal(
e.stopPropagation()}>
